series_metadata.series_title: Interstate Compact for the Placement of Children
series_metadata.series_description: Records pertaining to the placement of children within and outside the State of Ohio for adoption, foster care or residential treatment. Case files include: Interstate Compact Placement Request 100-A (JFS01661); Interstate Compact Placement Report on Child’s Placement Status 100-B(JFS 01662); Interstate Compact Transmittal (JFS 01640); Statement of Assurance(ODHS 1674); and Social and Medical HistoryBiological Mother and Father(ODHS 1616) BCII, FBI Central Registry, references, psychological, JFS 1653Medical statements and all other home study documents.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: 60 days hardcopy is prepped, scanned, indexed (imaged)and quality control is complete ; Electronic: microfilm or CD in office permanently
